laws.title: Keyboard Navigation
laws.description: Ensure that all interactive elements are accessible via keyboard navigation.
laws.remediation: Test site keyboard accessibility and fix any navigation flow issues.

laws.title: Alternative Text for Images
laws.description: All images should have descriptive alternative text for screen reader users.
laws.remediation: Audit current site images for alternative text and add missing descriptions.

laws.title: Color Contrast Ratio
laws.description: Text and interactive elements must have a sufficient contrast ratio against their backgrounds.
laws.remediation: Adjust color schemes as necessary to meet WCAG contrast requirements.

laws.title: ARIA Landmarks Usage
laws.description: Use ARIA landmarks to define page regions to improve screen reader navigation.
laws.remediation: Add ARIA landmark roles to main, navigation, and complementary site sections.

laws.title: Video Closed Captions
laws.description: Ensure all video content has accurate closed captions available for accessibility.
laws.remediation: Review video content for caption accuracy and consistency with spoken dialogue.
